summary: Iteration 8 — Verified in-dashboard Book Spa / Book Dinner modal flows and countdown recompute after Modify. All three targeted scenarios PASS: (1) Spa flow adds $380 Rose Hammam to spa list + folio, balance-due & balance-extras increase by $380, folio-extras-list shows 'Rose Hammam'. (2) Dinner flow adds $272 (68*4) Rooftop Grill to dining list + folio. (3) Countdown recomputed from 6 days -> 20 days after modify, and Seconds counter is decrementing live (08 -> 06 after ~2s). Regression scenarios: Modify Booking now works (dates update, toast fires); Pay Balance modal opens (settle balance modal visible); minor test-selector issue on my side prevented full auto-verification of $0 balance after pay — visually confirmed the 'Pay $3,390' button is present and clickable.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx is 1389 lines — should be split into smaller modules (BookSpaModal, BookDinnerModal, ModifyBookingModal, PayBalanceModal each as own file) for maintainability.

confirmBookSpa/Dinner do not validate that date/time are non-empty before adding to folio; user can confirm with default values, which is acceptable given defaults are pre-populated but consider explicit validation.
priceMap in confirmBookDinner is duplicated with restaurant list — extract to a single source of truth.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Book Spa / Book Dinner in-dashboard modals verified. Countdown reactive on stay.checkIn change. Dashboard.jsx is 1389 lines — candidate for refactor. Test used viewport 1440x900 and cleared localStorage between scenarios.
